data.title: .test-index: glob pattern entries non-functional with exact-match parser in test-gate
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: .test-index adds glob-pattern entries (plugins/dso/agents/*.md and plugins/dso/skills/**/*.md) that reference test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh. The parse_test_index function uses exact string matching — these glob entries never match individual file paths and create no test-gate coverage as intended.
File: .test-index
Category: maintainability
